message:
test(fcp-mesh,fcp-core,fcp-sdk): expand 8 more modules to 100+ tests (+371 tests)

fcp-mesh: node(70→110), device(92→142)
fcp-core: event(69→113), lease(61→105), crdt(65→111)
fcp-sdk: lib(77→108), ratelimit(63→102), retry(88→115)

Crate totals: fcp-mesh 1005, fcp-core 3439, fcp-sdk 901

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
